title: FunctionResponse
description: The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function call.

name.description: Required. The name of the function to call. Must be a-z, A-Z, 0-9, or contain underscores and dashes, with a maximum length of 63.

response.description: Required. The function response in JSON object format.
